Aron Kaufman’s passion lies in witnessing the success of individuals, tailored to what success means to them. With a profound understanding of business and a strong desire to see people reach their goals, Aron transitioned to professional coaching in 2019. His lifelong focus on helping others succeed and his keen business insights led him to pursue coaching as a dream profession. Aron’s unique ability to understand business and his genuine excitement for others’ success makes him a dedicated coach committed to helping individuals achieve their full potential.
As a seasoned salesman, marketer, operator, and entrepreneur with two successful exits, Sol Katz brings a rich array of experiences to the coaching table. Passionate about self-development as the core of great leadership, Sol focuses on helping leaders grow their businesses by enhancing their leadership skills and overcoming personal and practical obstacles. With a wealth of experience and a commitment to guiding others toward growth, Sol’s coaching approach combines practical insights with a genuine understanding of the challenges leaders face.
With over seven years of experience in business consulting and coaching, Shmuel Moskowitz is a seasoned leader with a proven track record. Having led a department in a large corporation overseeing 70 employees, Shmuel’s expertise extends to seminars and training sessions that have impacted hundreds of business owners. He brings a wealth of knowledge in business management, providing targeted courses to address challenges faced by business owners. Shmuel’s extensive experience includes increasing and structuring a model for team collaboration. Shmuel is a driven and no-nonsense leader who offers acute business acumen and an impressive network of satisfied clients.
Ricky Rosenberg’s coaching prowess lies in her positive mindset and warm personality, creating an environment where clients can tap into their hidden potential. With tried and true skills, Ricky empowers her audience to embrace positive change through inspirational guidance. Her holistic approach, coupled with a gentle yet self-assured style, allows those seeking transformation to uncover their true abilities and achieve their goals. Ricky’s coaching is a journey toward empowerment, where her positive mindset becomes a catalyst for realizing her full potential in record time.

Aron’s unique ability to understand business and his genuine excitement for others’ success makes him a dedicated coach committed to helping individuals achieve their full potential.
Meet Shulem Berkowitz, an executive holistic transformational coach with a diverse background in writing, design, marketing, and online entrepreneurship. Shulem’s professional journey evolved from founding a successful online marketing company to becoming a coach with expertise in business, psychology, and spiritual insight. His unique perspective, honed through crafting business strategies and navigating human behavior, guides clients toward profound mindset shifts. As a trusted confidant, Shulem brings warmth, positivity, and a focus on propelling individuals and businesses into a future aligned with their aspirations. Engaging with Shulem isn’t just hiring a coach; it’s embarking on a transformative journey together.
